programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E234
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is risking city-pop songwriter nokdu! nokdu made his big debut in 2018 with the single "Say My Name." As a graduate of The Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts, founded by Paul McCartney and Mark Featherstone-Witty, he covers a wide range of genres in his music, ranging from Brit-pop to punk to R&B. Backed up by his academic background, he boasts his outstanding ability not only as a songwriter but also a lyricist, producer, and singer. Also known for his stage manners, he is quickly capturing the ears and souls of countless listeners. Currently, he's taking part in the competition program "Super Band 2." His fantastic performance in the show definitely makes us anticipate his future as a musician. In this episode, nokdu performs "Stay With Me," "Wona," and more to show off the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE: S1 E237
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special, the Year-End Special, and the New-Year Special, and the guest of the Year-End Special Episode is Kwon Jin ah. Kwon Jin ah is known for her tranquil and heartwarming voice that genuinely comforts our hearts. In February this year, she released her first self-produced EP, “The Way For Us,” and showed off her capabilities as a songwriter and producer as well. In this episode, Kwon Jin ah performs “KNOCK,” “This Winter,” and her solo version of “Hello Antenna, Hello Christmas,” the carol jointly released by musicians on the record label Antenna. Also famous for her live singing skills and ticket-selling power, this artist is bound to melt our souls during this cold winter season. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene, including Jannabi, 10CM, HYUKOH, SE SO NEON, CNBLUE, Jeongmilla, BIBI, NIve, and Lydia Lee, have participated in the show. Also, only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.desc: "Something Happened" - Douglas becomes a Spaceologist, Roy's life is changed by a bad back, and Jen gets involved with a rock band.

programme.title: IT Crowd - Bad Boys
programme.desc: "Bad Boys" - Roy and Moss become juvenile delinquents for the day and have an uncomfortable experience at a shopping center.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show - The Return of Happy Spangler
programme.desc: ''The Return of Happy Spangler'' - Rob makes the mistake of trying to help the old-time radio comedy writer who gave him his first break.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show - Never Name a Duck
programme.desc: ''Never Name a Duck'' - Ritchie adopts two baby ducks and Rob faces the task of making him understand the consequence of trying to keep pets that may be happier living in the wild.

programme.title: That Girl - Kimono My House
programme.desc: "Kimono My House" - When Ann finds out how messy Don's apartment is, she hires a maid to help him clean the place up.

programme.title: IT Crowd - Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: "Smoke and Mirrors" - When a bad bra causes Jen to lose concentration in a board meeting, Moss invents a bra that will never, ever go bad.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience - Frank and Nayoung
programme.desc: "Frank and Nayoung" - Mr. Kim is frustrated with Frank, a repairman who talks too much, while Janet's cousin visits from Korea.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience - Wingman
programme.desc: "Wingman" - Mr. Chin asks Mr. Kim to be his wingman on a date, which is fine until Mrs. Kim tags along.

programme.title: Bernie
programme.desc: In the tiny, rural town of Carthage, TX, assistant funeral director Bernie Tiede was one of the town's most beloved residents. He taught Sunday school, sang in the church choir and was always willing to lend a helping hand. Everyone loved and appreciated Bernie, so it came as no surprise when he befriended Marjorie Nugent, an affluent widow who was as well known for her sour attitude as her fortune. Bernie frequently traveled with Marjorie and even managed her banking affairs. Marjorie quickly became fully dependent on Bernie and his generosity and Bernie struggled to meet her increasing demands. Bernie continued to handle her affairs, and the townspeople went months without seeing Marjorie. The people of Carthage were shocked when it was reported that Marjorie Nugent had been dead for some time, and Bernie Tiede was being charged with the murder.

programme.title: That Girl - The Mating Game
programme.desc: "The Mating Game" - While working on an expose on the inner workings of a game show called "The Mating Game," Donald sends Ann to go undercover as a bachelorette.

programme.title: That Girl - Pass the Potatoes, Ethel Merman
programme.desc: "Pass the Potatoes, Ethel Merman" - A walk-on role for a play starring Ethel Merman in a revival of "Gypsy" leaves Ann awestruck.

programme.title: That Girl - The Good Skate
programme.desc: "The Good Skate" - Ann auditions for a soda commercial that requires a performance on roller skates, something she has a little difficulty with.

programme.title: That Girl - To Each Her Own
programme.desc: "To Each Her Own" - Donald does a news story on computer dating and takes Ann along for the ride. Much to Ann's chagrin, the girl that the computer dating service assigns to her boyfriend is a lot like her.

programme.title: That Girl - The Apartment
programme.desc: "The Apartment" - Donald gets Ann to house sit at his apartment, and she runs into another friend of his (Bill Bixby), who is also staying there.

programme.title: That Girl - Absence Makes the Heart Grow Nervous
programme.desc: "Absence Makes the Heart Grow Nervous" - Before Ann goes to Philadelphia for a play that's making a nationwide tour, Donald tries to show her a good time by giving her a night on the town...and another night...and another night...

programme.title: That Girl - The Philadelphia Story
programme.desc: "The Philadelphia Story" - Unable to tolerate life without Ann, Donald goes to Philadelphia to write a review of Ann's play.

programme.title: That Girl - There's Nothing to Be Afreud of But Freud Himself
programme.desc: "There's Nothing to Be Afreud of But Freud Himself" - Donald writes an article on a newfangled psychological exam, and he tries to use it on Ann and the Baumans.

programme.title: That Girl - The Collaborators
programme.desc: "The Collaborators" - Ann and Donald decide to work on a play about her life, but creative differences get in the way.

programme.title: That Girl - When in Rome
programme.desc: "When in Rome" - An Italian movie director spots Ann and wants her to star in his next movie...and perform a nude scene.

programme.title: That Girl - Thanksgiving Comes But Once a Year, Thankfully
programme.desc: "Thanksgiving Comes But Once a Year, Thankfully" - Ann struggles to cook everybody's favorite dishes for a Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: That Girl - The Mailman Cometh
programme.desc: "The Mailman Cometh" - A substitute agent sets Ann up on a publicity date with Dick Shawn, who knows nothing about it.

programme.title: That Girl - It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 1)
programme.desc: "It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 1)" - Originally doubting the intentions of a photographer, Ann is convinced, thanks to Donald, that she should take a job as a model for him because he's legitimate.

programme.title: That Girl - It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)
programme.desc: "It's a Mod, Mod World (Part 2)" - Donald is on the edge over Ann's time with Noel Prince, despite her assurances she has no interest in her new boss.

programme.title: That Girl - Twas the Night Before Christmas, You're Under Arrest
programme.desc: "Twas the Night Before Christmas, You're Under Arrest" - Ann buys theater tickets from a scalper as a Christmas present for the Baumans, but she later learns from Don that some scalpers use personal information to burglarize their customers.

programme.title: That Girl - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: "A Friend in Need" - After Ann is injured on a movie set, Donald goes overboard in trying to take care of her.

programme.title: That Girl - Fur All We Know
programme.desc: "Fur All We Know" - After Ann models an expensive chinchilla stole, the owner insists that she borrow it as she accompanies Don to a party for the wealthy jet set where she is mistaken for an heiress.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Heather Mabbott: I Didn't Mean To Say That
programme.desc: Her quick wit and unique style has dazzled audiences all over the country. Heather is a clean comedian and has performed with some of the best, like Caroline Rhea, Jimmy Walker, Bobcat Goldthwait, Bruce Baum, Sinbad, and many, many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: John Wesley Austin: Straight Shooter
programme.desc: John Wesley Austin has been working the comedy club circuit for over 18 years, & it shows in his side-splitting and sometimes-outrageous stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Leanne Morgan - So Yummy
programme.desc: Leanne Morgan exudes southern charm. She is a naturally funny storyteller who gives an honest look at suburban life and the challenges of keeping her husband happy while juggling kids, dogs and cheerleading camp at the same time she’s racing to get her hair highlighted, have a colonoscopy and join weight watchers for the 7th time! Leanne will take you on a hilarious journey through motherhood and beyond as she finds comedy amidst the chaos.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: David Harris: Recalculating
programme.desc: David Harris is a nationally touring, regionally Emmy Award Winning comedian, magician, actor, and host. Harris has entertained North American audiences for over 20 years with over 2000 live performances to date. He regularly appears at clubs, colleges, corporate events, theaters, arts centers, alternative rooms and other top venues across the U.S. and Canada.

programme.title: Daniel Eachus - A Mild and Skinny Guy
programme.desc: Daniel Eachus talks about weird jobs, strange fears, and how to prank restaurants all through the lens of being the lifelong skinny guy.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Mark Klein: Life Solved
programme.desc: Mark Klein is a middle-aged man from Louisville, Kentucky. He brings with him a short list of bad habits, the five compromises of marriage, the miracle of the free society, and life's most important lesson.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Nazareth - American by Choice
programme.desc: Award Winning Comedian Nazareth, has been seen by over 40 Million people around the world through live concerts, TV and Radio broadcasts. His list of TV appearances include: Comedy Central, ABC Family, NBC, CBS, and TBN.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Mike Toomey - Welcome to My World
programme.desc: With his Sharp Delivery, quick wit, and unique style, Mike Toomey has been a favorite at comedy clubs and special events since 1982. A Daily performer on The WGN Morning News in Chicago, Mike has appeared in concert with such names as George Carlin, Wayne Newton, Crosby, Stills & Nash, and Reba McIntyre. He has performed on numerous television programs including HBO's U.S. Comedy Arts Festival in Aspen Colorado MTV's Half Hour Comedy Hour and A&E's Comedy on the Road. The Chicago Tribune calls Mike, "One of the funniest and most talented performers to ever work in Chicago." For an evening of uncontrollable laughs, Mike Toomey is a sure choice!

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Johnny Beehner - The Flamingo Special
programme.desc: Johnny Beehner puts on a funny show. He's got everything you want from a comic: He's silly, he’s likeable, and he's fun. With a background in improvisational theater including training at Chicago’s prestigious Second City, as well as the Upright Citizens Brigade in Los Angeles, Johnny brings a unique style to the stage. Beehner made his network television debut in January of 2015 as one of the last comedians to appear on the Late Show with David Letterman. He has made numerous appearances on FOX "Laughs" television show, and regularly appears on the nationally syndicated Bob & Tom Show. His comedy can be heard regularly on XM/ Sirius Satellite radio. Other notable and accomplishments of Johnny's include winning First place in Comcast's 2014 season of "Trial By Laughter," placing third in the 2014 “Laughing Skull Comedy Festival” of Atlanta, and making it to the finals in the 2012 “Great American Comedy Festival”. He was named one of Ricky Gervais' Top 5 picks in the "Just Sayin” stand up contest. Johnny was recently named one of 2015's Top10, "Hot Comics to Watch" by his wife. She says that he would have a shot at the #1 spot if he would “work just a little bit harder”. He's a married man, a new dad, and his current life goal is to win just one argument with his beautiful wife.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Cam Bertrand - Sophisticated Ignorance
programme.desc: Cam shares his outlook on relationships and life through the eyes of a 23-year-old in a way that everyone can relate to. Bringing high energy and witty style that appeals to a wide demographic.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Andrew Sleighter - Breakfast Stealer
programme.desc: Andrew Sleighter started in comedy looking for the perfect funny line to open a biography. Since then, Andrewís laid-back style and clever writing has won him appreciation from fans and respect from his peers. A regular at colleges and comedy clubs across the country, Andrewís also performed at some of the most prestigious comedy festivals in and out of the country including Bumbershoot, Bridgetown, The Cabo Comedy Festival, The Aspen Comedy Festival, Laughing Skull, and the Johnny Carson Great American Comedy Festival. Andrew wrote and blogged for the Sports Show with Norm Macdonald on Comedy Central and was a regular on the MTV prank show Money From Strangers. Heís performed on Nuvo TVís Stand Up & Deliver, Last Comic Standing, and made his late-night stand-up debut on Conan. Andrewís comedy has the ability to reach wide ranges of audiences and works in a diversity of rooms. Reliable and consistent, he rarely ends a show by lighting the stage on fire out of rage. Most importantly, heís constantly fascinated by and eager to keep learning about stand-up.

programme.title: Cleto Rodriguez - Cleto is My Real Name
programme.desc: Rodriguez connects with audiences by relating everyday life experiences. Anything and everything is fair game, from marriage mishaps to the challenges of dieting. His comedy is high-energy, observational and hilarious with a brilliant Latino twist.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy: Robert Mac - Back to Lake Titicaca
programme.desc: Robert Mac returns to the Dry Bar stage with less smartness, less subtleness, and even more silliness.

programme.title: Bengt Washburn: Poking a Grizzly
programme.desc: Bengt Washburn is an Aquarius with Hazel eyes who prefers boxer briefs, solid deodorants, and Crest toothpaste.

programme.title: Debra DiGiovanni: Single, Awkward, Female
programme.desc: Debra DiGiovanni is one of the fastest rising international comedy stars. A finalist on Last Comic Standing.

programme.title: Andy Kindler: I Wish I Was Bitter
programme.desc: Comedian Andy Kindler ridicules popular culture, show business, and himself in this intimate stand-up comedy performance.

programme.title: Aries Spears: Comedy Blueprint
programme.desc: Armed with his ferociously aggressive style of comedy, MADTV alum, Aries Spears takes the stage in Philadelphia for "Comedy Blueprint".

programme.title: Tommy Davidson: Takin' It To D.C.
programme.desc: This is Tommy Davidson, from "In Living Color", at his funniest! Check out this classic stand-up special and remember the 90s!

programme.title: Danny Bhoy: Subject to Change
programme.desc: Recorded live in Montreal, this is the much-awaited North American debut of Scottish comedy sensation Danny Bhoy.

programme.title: Chris Gethard: Half My Life
programme.desc: Chris Gethard delivers his blend of hard-hitting stand up & storytelling at small venues across the country at the end of 2019.

programme.title: Paul Rodriguez: The Here and Wow
programme.desc: Veteran comedian, Paul Rodriguez hits the stage to give you his perspectives on life.

programme.title: RIFFTRAX - The Bride And The Beast
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's horror classic about a lovely woman attracted to beasts.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Harry the Dirty Dog
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about a dirty dog that really doesn't want a bath. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Harry The Dirty Dog!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Rollergator
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to Rollergator! Shot on video without any fancy pants “microphones” or “lights” or “permits to record here”, Rollergator is truly something to behold. Please join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Rollergator.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Boredom at Work
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the silent killer, boredeom. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Boredom at Work!

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Scared to Death
programme.desc: Hot-headed novelist and former police detective, Ted Lonergan is the only man who can stop the monster in the Los Angeles sewer. Despite his girlfriend’s life being at stake , Lonergan is as useful as if he’d never been brought in on the case! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mary Jo and Bridget from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Setting Up a Room
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the best way to set up a room. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Setting Up a Room!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Retro Puppet Master
programme.desc: Oh hai! The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to this direct-to-video prequel to the C-list 90s horror movie franchise starring The Rooms Greg Sestero! Join Mike, Kevin, Chris R, and Bill for Retro Puppet Master.

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: Coffeehouse Rendezvous
programme.desc: This short makes a strong case that what kids need are coffeehouse rendezvous. Join Mike, Kevin and Bill as they grab a cup of Joe for Coffeehouse Rendezvous!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Future Force
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this David Carradine action classic about a bounty hunter who must protect a woman reporter from a gang of renegade cops. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Future Force!

programme.title: The Clown Problem The Ninja Problem
programme.desc: The Fred Rogers Company introduces a new animated preschool series featuring Peg and her sidekick, Cat, as they encounter unexpected challenges that require arithmetic and problem-solving skills. Each episode features two stories in which Peg and Cat face a math word problem that they must solve. Children will learn how to build calculation skills and think about larger concepts that will help them form the foundation for learning math at any level, from kindergarten through calculus.

programme.title: Bedtime for Bear
programme.desc: Four fairytale friends go on magical adventures and become reading-powered superheroes. The characters live in Storybook Village, which is accessible through a panel that is represented by an invisible question mark. Preschool children follow the Super Readers as they jump into books that come to life.

programme.title: Calm at the Clock Factory Calm for Storytime
programme.desc: The first series inspired by "Mister Rogers Neighborhood," "Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood" features 4-year-old Daniel Tiger, son of the original program's Daniel Striped Tiger. Every day Daniel puts on his red sweater, ties his shoes, and invites a new generation of preschoolers into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Daniel shares his daily adventures with pals O the Owl, Katerina Kittycat, Prince Wednesday and Miss Elaina. With the help of Daniel and his friends, preschoolers have fun and learn practical skills necessary for growing and developing.

programme.title: Playtime Is Different The Playground Is Different With Baby
programme.desc: The first series inspired by "Mister Rogers Neighborhood," "Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood" features 4-year-old Daniel Tiger, son of the original program's Daniel Striped Tiger. Every day Daniel puts on his red sweater, ties his shoes, and invites a new generation of preschoolers into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Daniel shares his daily adventures with pals O the Owl, Katerina Kittycat, Prince Wednesday and Miss Elaina. With the help of Daniel and his friends, preschoolers have fun and learn practical skills necessary for growing and developing.

programme.title: Teacher Appreciation Day
programme.desc: A longtime favorite of children and adults, and a staple of PBS, "Sesame Street" bridges many cultural and educational gaps with a fun program. Big Bird leads a cast of characters teaching children numbers, colors and the alphabet. Bert and Ernie, Oscar the Grouch and Grover are just a few of the other creatures involved in this show, set on a city street full of valuable learning opportunities.

programme.title: A Moth Mystery Just Peachy
programme.desc: Fluttering moths distract the kids when they try to sing their new Sunny Summer Song the kids give away peaches to their friends in Animal Town.

programme.title: The Birdwell Island Blues The Big Red World
programme.desc: Clifford, a 20-foot-tall red dog who loves stories, and his owner, Emily Elizabeth, enjoy new adventures as they explore their island home. Clifford, Emily and their friends all live on Birdwell Island, where they practice good citizenship. Inspired by the scholastic book series by Norman Bridwell, each episode emphasizes social-emotional skills and a curriculum that promotes early literacy and imaginative play.

programme.title: Don's Hole-iday We're Not All Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Preschoolers get to hop on board the "Dinosaur Train" to learn about natural science, natural history and paleontology. Each half-hour episode of this series, produced in CGI-animated format by the Jim Henson Company, features Buddy, a preschool-aged Tyrannosaurus Rex, and his adoptive Pteranodon family traveling on a special train to meet all kinds of dinosaurs and explore the world inhabited by these amazing creatures. Also included are live-action segments hosted by paleontologist Scott Sampson.

programme.title: Speaking Wigglewalker London Frog
programme.desc: Andy and friends get confused while shopping in London, due to differences between British and American English Luna explains to Andy how sounds of the city help them find their way.

programme.title: Monkey the Magnificent Curious George: Cat Sitter
programme.desc: Curious George is a sweet African monkey who can't help but run into trouble. George's friend, "The Man in the Yellow Hat," tries very hard to care for George and is always saving the day. The show's themes are about learning, forgiveness and playful curiosity.

programme.title: Stream and Shout Hal's Day Off
programme.desc: This animated series centers on house cat Fred, a dreamer of the great outdoors. Once his family leaves for the day, Fred becomes Nature Cat and with the help of his animal friends, he embarks on action-packed adventures that allow him to explore the natural world. The series is voiced by comic actors, including "Saturday Night Live" alums Taran Killam (Nature Cat), Kate McKinnon (Squeeks), Bobby Moynihan (Hal) and Kenan Thompson (Ronald). Kate Micucci rounds out the cast as Daisy.

programme.title: I Am James Naismith I Am Temple Grandin
programme.desc: Inventor James Naismith inspires Xavier, Yadina and Brad to invent their own game Temple Grandin helps Yadina make friends with a new boy from her class, Ben.

programme.title: The Night Manager Not So Permafrost

With live hosts Bianca and Harry, the team must protect Motherboard from the evil Hacker who wants to rule Cyberspace. Using gadgets and following clues, the team solves math mysteries and any other problem that comes their way.

programme.title: Once Bitten, Twice Shy
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement - Episode 107
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something...one of the Magic Books! It's "The Book of Deception." They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment - Episode 7
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter - and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win "The Blade Cup" where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: The Black Knight - Episode 108
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The "fake" knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black - The BLACK KNIGHT - appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find...young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Kate's Island - Episode 8
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate - but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Green Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd - but realize they have to work together in their attempt to rescue Lloyd from the snakes inside the unstable Fire Temple that is built on a volcano.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness - Episode 109
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap...is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: "The Book of Destruction." With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel - Episode 9
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression - but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon - but can they trust him?

programme.title: The Might And The Magic - Episode 110
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful "Book of Revenge!" Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege...will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: The Rise Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: The ninja haste to the lost city of Ouroboros to try to stop Pythor from awaking The Great Devourer but it is a race against time.

programme.title: Back To School - Episode 201
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro - in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way - they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go "back to school" to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much "fish out of water" at the academy, even with the "cool kids" - Robin and Ava - showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as "library helpers" much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book...isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Getting The Message - Episode 11
programme.desc: As the Friends enjoy Heartlake Amusement Park, Emma types a text to Mia, but sends it to Matthew by mistake a text that could be mega-embarrassing for Emma! As her BFF's, the Friends race to find Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they must brave space rides, dunking booths and worse: the boys locker room! What's more frightening than a roller coaster? More twisted than a funhouse mirror? A text gone wrong! The Friends' fun day at Heartlake Amusement Park turns into a frantic race against time when Emma discovers that her innocent text to Mia was sent to Matthew by mistake -- a text that accidentally sounds like a pledge of Emma's undying love for Matthew! Mega-embarrassing! As Emma's BFF's, the Friends must scramble to retrieve Matthew's phone and erase the text before he reads it. But first, they need to brave space rides, dunking booths, an angry brute and worse - the boys locker room!

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: Greed Is Good? - Episode 202
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. "Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure" says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as "general manager" of "castle operations," much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm - AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge "Gold is Good" ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything...including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live...poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents - Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond -think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a "spa holiday" with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into...Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says "No deal." "We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents." It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Darkness Shall Rise
programme.desc: Just as the rebuilding effort in Ninjago begins, the four ninjas come to realize that evil has started to resurface with Lord Garmadon forging the ninjas' lost Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers. With the Devourer destroyed, Ninjago is saved and the rebuilding effort begins. Without their Golden Weapons, the Ninja are stripped of their elemental powers. And with their flying ship 'The Destiny's Bounty' destroyed, the Ninja are forced to find a new home in the city. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon resurfaces and gains control of the Serpentine as well as transforms the Bounty's wreckage to become 'The Black Bounty'. The Ninja will battle Scales and discover evil has begun to resurface in Ninjago, while Lord Garmadon will successfully forge the Golden Weapons into a Mega-Weapon with unspeakable powers.

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession - Episode 203
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the "Knight-a-Kon" in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever "infiltration" mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the "Minitrex" - a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for "Best Costume." The prize: "Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1." The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just...about...to get the book when...the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! "Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1" is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy...she deserves to read it.

programme.title: The Drooling Detective - Episode 13
programme.desc: When ruthless dognappers steal Mia's dog Toffee from the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show, it's up to the Friends to play detective and track down the culprits, with the help of an unlikely hero: Stephanie's borrowed sad-sack bloodhound, Benchley. Andrea and her singing dog act, the Howlers, are a sure bet to win the Heartlake City Dog Talent Show - in spite of stiff competition from Tanya's dancing poodle, Olivia's Robo-Dog, and even Stephanie's sad-sack borrowed bloodhound, Benchley. But when an unscrupulous mother-and-son dog-napping team steals the Howlers' best singer, Mia's dog Toffee, it's up to the Friends to rescue him and catch the baddies with the help of the Hero Of The Day - Benchley!

programme.title: Pirates Vs. Ninja
programme.desc: When Garmadon by accident brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty - the ruthless Captain Soto and his Pirates - it is up to our ninjas to stop them from plundering Ninjago City. Sharing a tiny, one-bedroom apartment in the city, the Ninja take Lloyd to Grand Sensei Darreth's Mojo Dojo to begin training. There, they discover Lloyd has all four of their natural elemental abilities. Meanwhile, Lord Garmadon discovers his Mega-Weapon can't destroy, only create what the user wishes. By accident, Garmadon brings to life the original owners of the Black Bounty: Captain Soto and his Pirates, and they mutiny the ship. Answering the age-old question of who would win a fight between pirates and ninja, it's up to our ninja to stop Captain Soto and his men from plundering Ninjago City. In the end, Ninjago City is saved, the Pirates are arrested and Lord Garmadon escapes once again with their Black Bounty.

programme.title: The King's Tournament - Episode 204
programme.desc: Rival to the King, Jorah Tightwad thinks his knights - the Tighty Knighties - are easily better than the NEXO-Knights, so he challenges King Halbert to prove who's better during the King's Birthday Tournament. It's the King's birthday! To celebrate, the Queen and Macy always throw him a great, big birthday party consisting of a feast on birthday eve and a tournament the next day. At the birthday banquet is JORAH TIGHTWAD (last seen in episode 104.) He's goading the King (and on his birthday, even) and going on and on about how his knights are better than the NEXO-Knights. The King protests, but Jorah asks "How many magical books have your knights recovered? None, zilch, zero." But he produces the BOOK OF ENVY, which his superior knights captured from Jestro. The next day, the NEXO-Knights square off against Tightwad's four knights: JOUSTING BEEBER, BRICKNEY SPEARS, SHIA LABLADE and THE BLOK. We see that all these knights are envious of the NEXO-Knights: their weapons, their fame, their hair, etc. Macy is also disappointed to find out she CAN'T fight in the tournament - she's agreed to be in "princess mode" for her father's birthday. During the tournament, we see that Tightwad's knights are amazing in fighting contests. They all pair-off with knights who have their same weapons skills. Tightwad makes fun of the NEXO-Knights as his knights do well. Jestro and the Book of Monsters discover that Tightwad has the Book of Envy and he and his monsters attack the tournament. Then we learn that Tightwad's knights might be good tournament fighters, but they can't handle real fights and the NEXO-Knights must save them! Macy is finally able to join in the fight when she sees Magmar show up on the flank. The NEXO-Knights successfully defend the king, but Jestro gets away with the Book of Envy. Tightwad must admit his knights never won the book from Jestro he got the book when Merlok blasted books of magic across the realm. Tightwad's knights all admit that they really admire the NEXO-Knights.

programme.title: Rabbitouille - Episode 14
programme.desc: It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! Stephanie concocts a fabulous cake, and Sneaky Tanya steals the recipe -- but neither knows that pet bunny Daisy has added a secret key ingredient. Will Stephanie's frantic efforts to win at all costs end her friendship with her BFF's? It's Stephanie vs. Tanya on a TV Bake-Off to end all bake-offs! After the duo's rivalry brings Aunt Sophie's Adopt-A-Pet Fair to a disastrous end, a contrite Stephanie wants to make amends with the prize money from a TV Bake-Off show. At home, Stephanie practices baking a delicious cake, and Tanya steals the recipe. But neither girl knows that Stephanie's pet bunny has inadvertently added a secret ingredient, ensuring that no one can repeat the recipe. A frustrated Stephanie freaks out, nearly ending her friendship with the girls - until they discover the bunny's secret and race to help Stephanie win.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: When our heroes are invited back to Darkly's Boarding School, they discover it's a trap set up by Lord Garmadon and his evil replica ninjas created by Garmadon's new Mega-Weapo. Realizing how to correctly wield the Mega-Weapon, Lord Garmadon creates evil replicas of the Ninja to face off with our heroes. Meanwhile, Lloyd and the Ninja are invited back the Darkly's Boarding School, only to discover it's a trap and now the bad kids have seized control of the school. With the Ninja trapped in the school with the faculty, things spiral out of control as the Evil Replica Ninja arrive. As an awesome battle takes place in the school halls, the Ninja manage to outsmart their evil versions, and warn Lord Garmadon they're ready for whatever else he throws at them.

programme.title: Animal Jam!
programme.desc: Just think, all your favorite furry friends together right here for one animal packed hour, including: "Spy Penguin," "South Farm," "Bernard" and "Eddie Is A Yeti."

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child's life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Doby & Disy
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Toys and Fun Sisters

programme.title: NuNi
programme.desc: The series is aimed at children 2-6 years old, and although it can be fascinating for adults too, it speaks the language of toddlerhood: a language that is colorful, imaginative and humorous, and one that simplifies complex situations.

programme.title: Craft And Cooking Corner
programme.desc: It's time to get arty and cook, cut and craft with your friends from Badanamu Arts & Crafts, Kooki's Crafty Show, Wonderballs, How To Draw Om Nom and Ninja Pop.

programme.title: raggs
programme.desc: Raggs stars five members of a canine band, Raggs, Trilby, Pido, B. Max and Razzles, and their wise-cracking pet cat, Dumpster, who learn life lessons together in their own cool clubhouse.

programme.title: Agi Bagi
programme.desc: A peaceful and charming story about living on a crazy double sided planet and its residents - Agingas and Bagingas!

programme.title: Sophie la Girafe
programme.desc: Sophie la Girafe invites little ones to learn about colors, numbers, shapes, seasons, baby animals, instruments and fruits through games and songs along with nursery rhymes in her tender, colorful and poetic universe.

programme.title: Doby & Disy

programme.title: Fuzzy Tales
programme.desc: An all new take on some classic tales starring the cutest baby animals you have ever seen! A captivating blend of live action animals and beautiful animated backgrounds, Fuzzy Tales offers a fresh approach to mixed media that is adorably irresistible

programme.title: The Little Farmer Rabby: Persimmon
programme.desc: Baron craves a persimmon after not being able to eat due to indigestion. However, Rabby and Pusil struggle to find a ripe persimmon for Baron.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo: Ebb and the Greedy Gulls / Ebb's Birthday
programme.desc: Ebb and Bird lose their breakfast to a greedy gull. Unaware, Flo takes them for a beach picnic and Ebb has to guard the sandwiches from the gulls. Ebb gets the blame for eating the sandwiches / Ebb's squeaky ball has lost its squeak. And the next day is Ebb's birthday . Flo has organised a party for Ebb and after, Flo and Bird give Ebb a birthday gift. It's a brand new squeaky ball! Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Cam & Leon: Can't Sleep, Sleepy Ride

programme.title: Cam & Leon: Can-not Open, Static Fun
programme.desc: Can a can of food be used for anything other than storing food? Chasing after a cherry, Cam and Leon end up using the food can as boats. A make-shift walkie-talkie is a great source of fun for our inn

programme.title: Pirata and Capitano: The Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: On her birthday, Pirata finds a bottle with a treasure map inside! She immediately sets off in search of the treasure which is no easy task.

programme.title: Pirata and Capitano: Mystery Island
programme.desc: While navigating The Great Sea Pirata and her crew come across strange little natives sailing in a tiny coconut raft away from their island that they believe to be haunted.

programme.title: TuTiTu Learning Languages: Indoor Fun Time | English Hebrew
programme.desc: In this episode: Learning English and Hebrew with TuTiTu indoor fun time toys.

programme.title: Jelly Jamm: Flower Fear
programme.desc: While exploring the musical nature of spring on Jammbo, Goomo realizes he has a fear of Burst into Song flowers.

programme.title: Balloopo: Moon Mission/ Fetch
programme.desc: MOON MISSION Princess Elpo asks Balloopo and Paru to become 'Astropuffs' and go to the moon. FETCH Balloopo wants a pet and Paru tries everything to give him one.

programme.title: Insectibles: ENTER THE MANTIS
programme.desc: Separated from his team when they are captured by Hye and Lo, Zak turns to help from a praying mantis kung-fu master... who harbors a BIG secret.

programme.title: Afrina's Playtime Episode 1

programme.title: Kooki's Crafty Show Episode 1
programme.desc: Kooki is a wacky, peppy red panda who LOVES to make things. She babbles away in her own special language, but that’s okay, as each episode is narrated by a special little friend (who also helps translate). Every show has Kooki making two different things - from big, fun cardboard cutout creations to small, delightful handiworks. Whatever she’s doing, she’s always having fun and will inspire kids to unleash the wild side of their creativity.

programme.title: Rock the Park - New River Gorge National River
programme.desc: "New River Gorge National River" - Jack and Colton head into the Colorado Rockies for an action-packed canyoneering adventure.

programme.title: Rock the Park - NYC: National Parks of New York Harbor
programme.desc: "NYC: National Parks of New York Harbor" - Colton and Jack return to Colorado to hit the dunes of Great Sand Dunes National Park.

programme.title: The Voyager with Josh Garcia - Pure Spanish
programme.desc: ''Pure Spanish'' - After arriving in Girona, Josh heads for the Catalan countryside to learn about mar y montaña.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs - Lemur Babies!
programme.desc: "Lemur Babies!" - The team cares for the three, new, teeny-tiny additions to the park’s ring-tailed lemur troop. And discover all the good work being done through the SeaWorld & Busch Gardens Conservation Fund.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs - The Long and Short of It
programme.desc: "The Long and Short of It" - The team travels to Michigan to help restore one of the cutest and important animals in the forest, the American Marten. Plus, discover the history of the giraffe herd at Busch Gardens, and a female giraffe named Ruby is treated for a tooth infection.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Meet the Wolf Man
programme.desc: ''Meet the Wolf Man'' - On the first episode of Zoltan the Wolf Man, Zoltan Horkai, renowned animal trainer, welcomes us to the Horkai Animal Training Centre, home to more than 100 animals including several wolf packs, bears, and wild boars. Zoltan introduces the first pack of wolves while explaining his unique guidance method that revolves around natural motivation of the animals rather than traditional animal training. Zoltan must actively establish himself as the alpha male within each pack in order to maintain order and control among the animals.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Riding With Wolves
programme.desc: ''Riding With Wolves'' - This episode on Zoltan the Wolf Man, Zoltan prepares to create an audition tape of three different action scenes for a producer in Hollywood. The scenes will require scenarios involving the wolves, a bear, and a horse. The audition tape is due by the end of the week.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Blood And Beauty
programme.desc: ''Blood And Beauty'' - On episode three of Zoltan the Wolf Man, Peter informs Zoltan of a new commission they have received for an upcoming Hollywood fantasy movie. For this commission, Zoltan will have to train a stuntwoman named Virag to work with the wolves. Virag has never done work with live predators and appears to have some apprehensions about the job.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Feasting With Wolves
programme.desc: ''Feasting With Wolves'' - On this episode of Zoltan the Wolf Man, the team heads to the south of Poland to shoot some scenes for an upcoming feature film called ‘Erlprince’. The production team requires four different scenes from the wolves and Zoltan has only one week to prepare for the shoot.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Wolf Man & the Turkish Kangal
programme.desc: 'Wolf Man & the Turkish Kangal'' - This episode takes Zoltan and his team to an ancient mountain range in Turkey for a new international film called ‘Grain’. The task that Zoltan has been hired for involves an intricate scene featuring a man and a wolf, where the wolf is required to stand still and then walk in circle around the man and a camping area, all in one take. Zoltan knows this is no easy task for a wild animal. Zoltan figures that they will require 3 days of training in order to accomplish the tasks required for this scene. Zoltan decides that Nelson is the right wolf for the job, but also opts to take Volko, another wolf, as backup.

programme.title: Zoltan the Wolfman - Return Of The Wolf
programme.desc: ''Return Of The Wolf'' - This time on Zoltan the Wolf Man… Zoltan, Peter, and the wolves are off to southern Estonia, for a new commission. Before making the long trip to Estonia, Zoltan must attend to a few important issues at the training centre. It is mating season, and the wolves, especially the females, are behaving particularly aggressively.

programme.title: Rock the Park - Jasper National Park
programme.desc: "Jasper National Park" - Jack and Colton are back in Grand Teton National Park, kayaking the Snake River.

programme.title: Rock the Park - Churchill, Canada
programme.desc: "Churchill, Canada" - Colton and Jack are day-tripping through Yellowstone.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia - The Crocodiles
programme.desc: A vast island continent of almost 3 million miles, Australia is home to many unusual animals on the planet.

programme.title: Arabian Inferno - When The Rain Comes
programme.desc: Watch a desert landscape transform into a lush frenzy of feeding and breeding.

programme.title: Wild 24 - Africa's Savannah
programme.desc: Witness 24 hours on the African savannah, from the Apex carnivores, like the Lion, to the humble Meerkat.

programme.title: Fur Seals: Battle For Survival - Fur Seals: Battle For Survival
programme.desc: Follow two New Zealand Seal pups for the first months of their lives as they learn the secrets of survival.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - Foxes
programme.desc: Wild Wild East travels to Prince Edward Island to explore the family life of the Red Fox. These sly creatures are adept at living just on the fringes of the human world.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - Rivers
programme.desc: Wild Wild East swims in the Rivers of Nova Scotia. Two species of fish, the Shad and the Gaspereau swim upstream to their ancestral spawning grounds, while a colony of Double-Crested Cormorants thrive on the mouth of the Pictou River.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - Skies
programme.desc: Take to the sky to soar with the Bald Eagle. From Cape Breton’s Bras d’Or Lake, to the bird’s overwintering home in the Annapolis Valley, the Eagle’s raise families, hunt and forage for food, and compete for territory with another bird of prey, the Osprey.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - Tides
programme.desc: Follow the ebb and flow of the tides. Over a hundred thousand sandpipers migrating from the Arctic to South America make a pit stop along the Bay of Fundy. On the other side of Nova Scotia, the rocky-coastline provides a home for harbour and grey seals.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - Pollinators
programme.desc: The Annapolis Valley is the Wild Wild East’s most important agricultural center. We dive into the hive to explore the complex social structures of hardworking honeybees. The Monarch butterfly has travelled all the way from Mexico to feed off the local milkweed.

programme.title: Wild Wild East - City
programme.desc: It’s Halifax through the eyes of its wildest residents. During the day, squirrels and chipmunks compete for territory in the city park. At night, Halifax’s raccoons invade backyards and Seagulls scour the streets for pizza.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard - Goat Island
programme.desc: Meander through a peaceful marine reserve that’s home to huge schools of fish.

programme.title: Wild 24 - Chile's Atacama
programme.desc: A snapshot of the lives of a group of animals over 24 hours in the driest desert region on earth.

programme.title: Good Talk
programme.desc: The art and science of meaningful conversation. 1) 10 ways to have a better conversation | Celeste Headlee 2) Why do we, like, hesitate when we, um, speak? | Lorenzo García-Amaya 3) Don't call people out -- call them in | Loretta J. Ross 4) How to disagree productively and find common ground | Julia Dhar 5) 4 tips to kickstart honest conversations at work | Betsy Kauffman

programme.title: How to Be a Better You
programme.desc: Ready for a change? These well-researched (and heartfelt) ideas offer inspiration for all aspects of your life, from creativity to vulnerability, from competitive sports to collaborative games. 1) An ER doctor on triaging your "crazy busy" life | Darria Long 2) The secret to mastering life's biggest transitions | Bruce Feiler 3) How to manage your time more effectively (according to machines) | Brian Christian 4) What to do when everything feels broken | Daniel Alexander Jones 5) The creative power of your intuition | Bozoma Saint John

programme.title: The Connection
programme.desc: An exploration and meditation on how to nurture, sustain and improve all kinds of relationships in your life. 1) Why do we feel nostalgia? - Clay Routledge 2) How to be a good ancestor | Roman Krznaric 3) How compassion could save your strained relationships | Betty Hart 4) Should you trust your first impression? - Peter Mende-Siedlecki 5) You are not alone in your loneliness | Jonny Sun 6) How to raise successful kids -- without over-parenting | Julie Lythcott-Haims

programme.title: Close Up and Personal
programme.desc: Inspiring, life-affirming personal stories. 1) My journey from Marine to actor | Adam Driver 2) Frida Kahlo: The woman behind the legend - Iseult Gillespie 3) The price of shame | Monica Lewinsky 4) How one scientist took on the chemical industry 5) Notes of a native son: the world according to James Baldwin - Christina Greer

programme.title: Art of the Future
programme.desc: What does it look like inside the mind of a machine? See what creativity lies and thrives within, and meet those looking to unleash it. (1) Art in the age of machine intelligence | Refik Anadol (2) The incredible inventions of intuitive AI | Maurice Conti (3) The high-stakes race to make quantum computers work - Chiara Decaroli (4) How AI could compose a personalized soundtrack to your life | Pierre Barreau (5) How do hard drives work? - Kanawat Senanan (6) The mind-bending art of deep time | Katie Paterson

programme.title: The Future of Cities
programme.desc: Discover what's potentially in store for the world's urban hotspots. 1) What a driverless world could look like | Wanis Kabbaj 2) How cities are detoxing transportation | Monica Araya 3) What happens if you cut down all of a city's trees? | Stefan Al 4) How carbon capture networks could help curb climate change | Bas Sudmeijer 5) How to turn around a city | Irma L. Olguin Jr.

programme.title: School Smarts
programme.desc: Learn something new with these amazing educators as they give enlightening lessons on what's needed to make learning fun and school cool (as in accessible, effective and better overall). (1) Every kid needs a champion | Rita Pierson (2) Do IQ tests actually measure intelligence? (3)Teach girls bravery, not perfection | Reshma Saujani (4) How to escape education's death valley | Sir Ken Robinson (5) What percentage of your brain do you use? - Richard E. Cytowic

programme.title: The Business Angle
programme.desc: Insights from the professional world -- from CEOs, entrepreneurs, HR experts, everyday employees and more -- on how to run a successful business and make work life better for everyone. 1) How to build a company where the best ideas win | Ray Dalio 2) Why play is essential for business | Martin Reeves 3) How to spot a pyramid scheme | Stacie Bosley 4) The value of kindness at work | James Rhee 5) What gives a dollar bill its value? - Doug Levinson

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) Strange answers to the psychopath test | Jon Ronson 2) How gratitude rewires your brain | Christina Costa 3) What you can do to prevent Alzheimer's | Lisa Genova 4) Why we're more honest with machines than people | Anne Scherer

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The One Where Lightning Strikes Twice

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Let It Snow, Let It Snow, Let It Snow
programme.desc: Today's forecast is quite the doozy! Wind, followed by hail, and then with a bit of a hurricane for good measure. No, it's not the end of the world...it's just another day here on Extreme Weather Countdown! j

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Sudden Danger
programme.desc: In these viral videos we witness how, in the blink of an eye, your day can become suddenly dangerous. Even on a beautiful day, when you're not expecting any severe weather at all, Mother Nature can sometimes be malicious and sneaky

programme.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Niño
programme.desc: El Niño is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Niño occurs.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders: Part Two

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders: Part Three

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders: Part Four

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders: Part Five

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Planet of the Spiders: Part Six

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Robot: Part Two

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Robot: Part Three
programme.desc: Sealed inside an underground bunker, Miss Winters issues her demands to the world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Robot: Part Four
programme.desc: The Doctor races to avert a nuclear holocaust. The robot takes Sarah hostage.

programme.title: Love and Saucers
programme.desc: David Huggins lost his virginity to an alien woman and chronicled it all in surreal paintings.

programme.title: Australien Skies
programme.desc: Documentary film that explores the sightings of unidentified flying objects and the people who witness them

programme.title: Vampires in Australia

programme.title: Escape From Area 51
programme.desc: When a raid of the famous military base Area 51, an alien warrior uses a power glitch to escape from captivity

programme.title: The Bray Road Beast

programme.title: Forbidden Knowledge: Lost Secrets of Egypt and the Ancients
programme.desc: From our true origins and evolution, to occult secrets hidden from the masses since time immemorial

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic II," follows the path of its namesake. But when a tsunami hurls an ice berg into the new ship's path, the passengers and crew must fight to avoid a similar fate.

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Astronomer George Herbert (C. Thomas Howell) is assigned to investigate reports of strange meteors crashing into earth near New York, Los Angeles and Washington, D.C. As the meteors land, enormous multi-limbed metal creatures disembark and begin destroying everything and everyone in their path with heat-ray guns. Amidst the apocalyptic destruction, Herbert teams with a soldier (Andy Lauer) and a pastor (Rhett Giles) on his journey into Washington to reunite with his family.

programme.title: 40 Days and Nights
programme.desc: When a colossal tectonic shift causes the sea level to start rising, a microbiologist gathers the DNA of as many species as she can, while the military creates an "ark" in a desperate attempt to preserve life on Earth.

programme.title: Android Cop
programme.desc: In this futuristic, action-packed thriller, a cop and his robotic partner enter the Zone, a forbidden section of the city inhabited by a disease-stricken populace. Together, they discover the real reason everyone is sick, and attempt to stop the illness - with the help of the machine's powerful technology and weaponry.

programme.title: Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: In February 1942 US forces engaged an unidentified flying object above Los Angeles. Now almost 70 years later, the alien invaders have returned.

programme.title: CarGo
programme.desc: A young car learns the importance of family when he embarks on a mission to rescue his father - who's been sent to Clunker Island to be repurposed as junk metal.

programme.title: Would You Believe It? - Mummy in a Catalogue
